content:
This is a resource from the Mythag University server containing a general indication on **what Wheels and Covenants to use for all characters**; It includes, amidst other things, **a list of ALL the Wheels (SSR and SR), Covenants and Posses** (and how to get them) too.
https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/10UVim8m1SnY9fSDKfaH4AwnPPd22zsCDDNB6SV15yO4/edit?gid=116862529#gid=116862529
This resource is **continuously updated**, but we don't have all the info about some less used units, so if you have suggestions for modifications and additions, **feel free to let me know**, in dms or in the comments, with an adequate explanation, so we can continue to offer the best resource for the community.
thread_title: Morimens Glossary (Wheels and Covenants equip guide)
